query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white image showing the silhouette of a person wearing a cap, seated in profile view and leaning forward. The figure is centered against a bright, luminous background, with the surrounding areas falling into shadow. The person's posture, headwear, and shoulder line are visible as dark shapes against the lighter tone behind them.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph with extreme intentional blur and no discernible fine detail, presenting an abstract composition of a seated person in profile wearing a cap. The figure dissolves into a soft, smeared silhouette against a bright, diffuse background, abandoning representational clarity in favor of pure shape and tone. The resulting image evokes atmospheric distress through its ghostlike, ambiguous form and murky tonal transitions.
